title: saxifraga globulifera var. major
intro: Saxifraga globulifera var. major, also known as globular saxifrage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the saxifrage family (Saxifragaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Saxifraga globulifera var. major include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
